category_sources: source_facts.description says tools for building TCP client-server applications; official cr.yp.to page describes tcpserver and tcpclient conforming to UCSPI over TCP.
display_name_sources: Official cr.yp.to page and source_facts.name identify ucspi-tcp.
docs_sources: Official cr.yp.to pages provide overview, installation, and per-command documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official cr.yp.to pages distribute tarballs and documentation but do not expose an official source-control repository.
tags_sources: source_facts.description, executables, and official docs identify TCP client-server tools and command-line programs.
